title: Crisp Citrusy Ukrainian Fennel Skillet
description: A light and funky Ukrainian dish featuring katsuramuki-cut fennel, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This keto-friendly recipe is easy to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the katsuramuki-cut fennel and cook until browned and crispy, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Pour in the lemon juice and chicken broth, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the liquid has reduced by half, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt, black pepper, and paprika, and stir to combine.
Serve the fennel mixture hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
